title: HG Grout Cleaner Ready-to-Use, Removes Stubborn Dirt from Wall & Floor Tile Grout – 500ml
features: HG Grout Cleaner: A heavy duty ready-to-use wall or tile floor cleaner, for removing stubborn dirt, stains, marks and discolouration from the grouting in between tiles
Restores the original colour of the grouting: Ideal for use around the bath, shower, toilet area, sink splashback, hallway, en suite, utility area or swimming pool
Suitable for both wall and floor tile grout: The powerful buffered grout cleaning solution loosens dirt and deposits easily, without damaging your grouting or tiles
Safe for all tile types and grout colours: The grout cleaner spray is tough on stains, gentle on surfaces. Can be used as an in-between ceramic, porcelain, quarry tile or porcelain tile cleaner
1 x HG Grout Cleaner Spray, 500ml. Discover the full range of HG cleaning products, including HG Limescale Remover, HG Mould Remover, multi surface cleaners and all purpose cleaner sprays
description: Product Description HG’s ready-to-use Grout Cleaner spray is an effective tile grout cleaner that's gentle on grout yet tough on stubborn dirt between wall and floor tiles. It's perfect for bathrooms, kitchens, or other tiled areas in the home. The kitchen spray (or bathroom spray) is safe to use on all types of tiled surfaces - including ceramic, porcelain, quarry tile or porcelain tiles - as well as white or coloured grouting. The powerful in-between bathroom tile cleaner or kitchen tile cleaner gets to work fast, for minimal scrubbing. Any yellow/brown dirt that remains is limescale, which can be removed with HG Limescale Remover. Black grout in the bathroom is caused by mould - try HG Mould Remover spray (sold separately). Includes: 1 x HG Grout Cleaner (500ml spray). How to use: 1. Spray liberally on the grout. 2. Leave to work for a couple of minutes, then scrub the grout with a brush. 3. Remove loosened dirt with lukewarm water. Avoid contact with skin. Keep this HG cleaner out of children's reach. Always read the label. Discover the HG professional range of specialist household cleaning products and cleaning sprays, including HG Limescale Remover, multi-purpose cleaners and all surface cleaner sprays for your home, office or outside space. Directions 1.Spray the grout thoroughly, leaving the product to work for a few minutes. 2.Brush the grout with a brush and then wiping off the loose dirt with clean lukewarm water. 3.Repeat the treatment if necessary. Safety Warning Keep it out of the reach of children. Box Contains 1 x 0.5L Grout Cleaner ready to use See more
